response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10% below threshold) does not meet our minimum share threshold of 55%; accepting would drop us below safe autonomous operation margin (49.4% → ~48.7%), violating conservative policy during island conditions with multiple concurrent requests.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded with marginal SoC (49.4%); three neighbors requesting repeatedly. Conservative threshold (55%) preserves ~19 ticks of autonomous operation at 1 kW load. Small per-tick share (0.15 kW) maintains reciprocal presence without accelerating depletion..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
